---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for SundayRec
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the situation you're in. *Example: "Our visiting preachers don't want to be on the podcast feed, but we still want a recording for our archive — right now I have to manually move files."*

Starting with the **problem** (not a proposed solution) helps us think creatively about how to address it.

## What would you like to see?

A clear, short description of the feature or change you'd like.
*Example: "A per-recording 'archive only' checkbox that keeps the file but skips the RSS feed."*

## Why does this matter?

How often does this come up? How many people would benefit?
*Example: "Most churches have at least 3–4 guest speakers a year. Many of them don't want podcast distribution."*

## Have you considered alternatives?

Workarounds you've tried, or other ways of solving the problem.

## Anything else?

Links to similar features in other tools, mock-ups, screenshots — anything that helps us understand the idea.
